source.title: E173: Google buying HubSpot? FTX depositors not made whole, AI job fears, Ukraine joining NATO
source.notes: Matched against the Instagram reel thesis around Agent Maestro / agents > copilots.

clips.title: Agent Maestro: The Job of the Future
clips.hook: The job of the future is being the conductor of AI agents.
clips.why_viral: Clear framing shift from copilots to agent orchestration. Strong operator angle for Ghost AI audience.
clips.caption:
The real job shift isn't coder vs non-coder. It's operator vs orchestrator. Copilots were phase one. Agents are phase two. If you can direct a stack of AI agents toward one business outcome, that's leverage. 👻

Source: All-In Podcast
#AI #AIAgents #FutureOfWork #GhostAI

clips.title: Agents Are Phase Two
clips.hook: Forget copilots. Agents are phase two.
clips.why_viral: Shorter tactical clip with tighter language around agent stacks and outcome-driven work.
clips.caption:
Most people are still thinking in copilots. The real jump is orchestration: copy agent, design agent, ops agent, all moving toward one result. That's where the compounding starts. 👻

Source: All-In Podcast
#AI #Agents #Automation #GhostAI
